label: CMID
description: unique ID for all databases and node types

label: Key
description: Key used by a dataset to identify the entity

label: ISO3
description: ISO 636-3 alpha-3 used for languages or ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 used for districts

label: ISONumeric
description: ISO 3166-1 numeric code used for districts

label: FIPS
description: Federal Information Processing System identifer for geographic areas

label: project
description: name of project associated with dataset
